title: Kosullar (if/elif/else)
subtitle: Kosullu ifadeler ve karsilastirma operatorleri.
code:
score = 78

if score >= 90:
    grade = "AA"
elif score >= 70:
    grade = "BA"
elif score >= 50:
    grade = "CC"
else:
    grade = "FF"

print("Not:", score, "-> Harf notu:", grade)

# Ternary (kosullu ifade)
number = 7
parity = "Cift" if number % 2 == 0 else "Tek"
print(f"\n{number} sayisi {parity}")

# and / or / not
age = 20
has_id = True

if age >= 18 and has_id:
    print("\nGirise izin verildi.")
else:
    print("\nGiris reddedildi.")

# in operatoru
fruits = ["elma", "armut", "muz"]
if "elma" in fruits:
    print("\nElma listede var.")

# Zincirleme karsilastirma
x = 5
if 1 < x < 10:
    print("\nx, 1 ile 10 arasinda.")
